---
title: "lease_manager.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\core\lease_manager.py"
loc: 41
complexity: 2
logic_score: 7.47
style_score: 3.59
intel_score: 9.20
overall_score: 5.86
---

## Intent
The `lease_manager.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on LeaseManager, __init__, _get_conn, acquire_lease, release_lease. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via LeaseManager, __init__, _get_conn, acquire_lease, release_lease. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.2/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 9 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [sqlite3](file://sqlite3)
- [time](file://time)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)

### Exports
- `LeaseManager`
- `__init__`
- `_get_conn`
- `acquire_lease`
- `release_lease`
